package rulecoverage

func PositiveBinaryReadForSingleField() string {
    ruleID := "binary_read_for_single_field"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`binary.Read(r, order, &singleField)` for reading a single integer"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
